info.name: Dust Data Sources API
info.description:
Upsert, search, and manage documents, tables, and folders inside Dust data sources and data source views, organized into workspace spaces.

Contact Support:
 Name: Dust Support

query.description: (Required) The number of results to return
(Required) Whether to return the full document content
The number of tokens in the target document
